items.title: Duchy of Cornwall (No. 2) Act 1844
items.description: An Act to confirm and enfranchise the Estates of the Conventionary Tenants of the ancient Assessionable Manors of the Duchy of Cornwall, and to quiet Titles within the County of Cornwall as against the Duchy; and for other Purposes.

items.title: Night Poaching Act 1844
items.description: An Act to extend an Act of the Ninth Year of King George the Fourth, for the more effectual Prevention of Persons going armed by Night for the Destruction of Game.

items.title: Bank Charter Act 1844
items.description: An Act to regulate the Issue of Bank Notes, and for giving to the Governor and Company of the Bank of England certain Privileges for a limited Period.

items.title: School Sites Act 1844
items.description: An Act to secure the Terms on which Grants are made by Her Majesty out of the Parliamentary Grant for the Education of the Poor; and to explain the Act of the Fifth Year of the Reign of Her present Majesty, for the Conveyance of Sites for Schools.

items.title: New Parishes (Scotland) Act 1844
items.description: An Act to facilitate the disjoining or dividing of extensive or populous Parishes, and the erecting of new Parishes, in that Part of the United Kingdom called Scotland.

items.title: Lecturers and Parish Clerks Act 1844
items.description: An Act for better regulating the Offices of Lecturers and Parish Clerks.

items.title: Duchy of Cornwall Act 1844
items.description: An Act to enable the Council of His Royal Highness Albert Edward Prince of Wales to sell and exchange Lands and enfranchise Copyholds, Parcel of the Possessions of the Duchy of Cornwall, to purchase other Lands; and for other Purposes.

items.title: Judicial Committee Act 1844
items.description: An Act for amending an Act passed in the Fourth Year of the Reign of His late Majesty, intituled An Act for the better Administration of Justice in His Majesty's Privy Council; and to extend its Jurisdiction and Powers.

items.title: Execution Act 1844 (repealed)
items.description: An Act to amend the Law of Insolvency, Bankruptcy, and Execution.
